user_story: As an Employee, I want to record time entries for a selected period against a client, project and task, so that my work hours are captured accurately
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Timesheet Entry screen for a period; When I select Client, Project and Task and enter recorded hours; Then the entry is saved to my timesheet

user_story: As an Employee, I want to classify each entry by type of work (e.g. Development, QA, Support, Training), so that my time is categorized correctly
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding a timesheet entry; When I choose a Type of work from the list; Then the entry is tagged with that category

user_story: As an Employee, I want to mark whether time is productive and provide a non-productive reason (e.g. Internal, PTO/Holiday/Bench, Rework), so that productivity is reported correctly
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding a timesheet entry; When I set Is Productive to no and select a Non productive reason; Then the reason is recorded against the entry

user_story: As an Employee, I want to enter hours per day of the week (Su-Sa) with a running total, so that I can log time across the whole period
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Timesheet Entry screen; When I enter hours in the weekday columns; Then the Total recorded hour(s) updates accordingly

user_story: As an Employee, I want to add comments to a timesheet entry, so that I can provide context about the work performed
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding a timesheet entry; When I enter text in the Comments field and save; Then the comment is stored with the entry

user_story: As an Employee, I want to copy or import entries from an existing timesheet, so that I can avoid re-entering repetitive time records
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Timesheet Entry screen; When I use Copy From Existing or Import; Then entries from the chosen source are populated into the current period

user_story: As an Employee, I want to submit my timesheet for approval, so that my manager can review and approve my recorded hours
acceptance_criteria: Given I have completed my timesheet entries; When I click Submit for Approval; Then the timesheet status changes to submitted and is sent for approval

user_story: As an Employee, I want to search entries and navigate to the previous period, so that I can review or continue logging time efficiently
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Timesheet Entry screen; When I use Search or click Previous; Then I see matching entries or the prior period's timesheet
